question:
How many stars are there?

⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐
⭐
hints: Count each star from left to right, row by row.
solution: There are 11 stars. Count from left to right across both rows.

question:

hints: Count each heart one at a time.

solution: There are 13 hearts. 10 in the first row plus 3 in the second row.

question:

🏀 🏀 🏀 🏀 🏀 🏀 🏀 🏀 🏀 🏀
🏀 🏀 🏀 🏀 🏀 🏀 🏀 🏀
solution: Ben is right! There are 18 balls. 10 + 8 = 18.

question:
Which group has more? Type A or B.

Group A: 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺
Group B: 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺 🌺
hints: Group A: 12. Group B: 16. Which number is bigger?
solution: Group B has more. Group A has 12 and Group B has 16. Since 16 is more than 12, Group B has more.

question: You counted some crayons and the last number you said was 17. How many crayons are there?
hints: The last number you say when counting tells you the total.
solution: There are 17 crayons. The last number you say when counting is how many there are.

question: Mia counted these butterflies but skipped some numbers: 🦋(1) 🦋(2) 🦋(3) 🦋(5) 🦋(6) 🦋(7) 🦋(8) 🦋(9) 🦋(10) 🦋(11) 🦋(12) 🦋(14). She said there are 14. How many are there really?
hints: Mia skipped numbers 4 and 13. Count the butterflies, not the numbers she said.
Count each butterfly one at a time. There are 12 butterflies.
solution: There are 12 butterflies. Mia skipped 4 and 13 when counting, but each butterfly should get exactly one number: 1 through 12.
